title: dysoxylum arborescens
intro: Dysoxylum arborescens is a species of plant in the family Meliaceae, commonly known as the Philippine yellow ebony or yellow dysoxylum. The plant has been traditionally used in various herbal remedies due to its medicinal properties, including antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic activities. The health benefits of Dysoxylum arborescens include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its roots, bark, or leaves can be used to make herbal teas, tinctures, or ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
